title: 2023 Census product and release finder | Stats NZ
content:
## 2023 Census product and release finder
The 2023 Census product and release finde r is an Excel-based tool which provides easy-to-find data, statistical products, publications, and planned release dates in one place for the 2023 Census.
In this tool you will be able to find details for Māori descent or iwi affiliation data, product, geographic area, unit count, publishing date, titles and links for 2023 Census publications.
While this tool contains detailed information on publishing dates, the 2023 Census release schedule is the official release schedule for the 2023 Census products and services.
- 2023 Census product and release finder (updated 12 November 2025) Excel spreadsheet, 296 KB

### 2023 Census product and release finder (updated 12 November 2025)
Excel spreadsheet, 296 KB

## Information and updates
This tool links to published 2023 Census products and releases.
You can search for key words in:
Please note: Only ‘title’ is displayed in the finder.
DataInfo+ has a list of concepts to search.
- Māori descent and iwi affiliation data
- releases up to [month].
- Aotearoa Data Explorer
- Ethnic group summaries
- first release data tables
- information releases
- Map gallery (ArcGIS Online)
- metadata (DataInfo+)
- methods, standards, and research
Data is available for the following geographic breakdowns:
- regional council (RC)
- territorial authority local board (TALB)
- health district (Health)
- health region (Health)
- statistical area 3 (SA3)
- statistical area 2 (SA2)
- statistical area 1 (SA1).
Statistical standard for geographic areas 2023 (updated December 2023) has information about geographic boundaries as of 1 January 2023.
More information about using this resource is in the User guide tab of the tool.

## Subscribe to our newsletter
Subscribe to the Census Advisory newsletter to keep up to date with census information.
Information centre for help finding or using the 2023 Census data. Customised data services team for any customised data. Te Ara Takatū for census data for iwi and iwi-related groups.
